name: raycast-ai-custom-providers
title: Raycast AI Custom Providers
description: Manage custom Raycast AI provider through extension
author: ernest0n

commands.name: manage-custom-providers
commands.title: Manage Custom Providers
commands.description: Manage custom AI providers and models for Chat AI

preferences.name: createBackup
preferences.description: Create a backup file when making changes to the YAML configuration file
preferences.label: Create backup after changes

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
